In the quest for excellence, why limit ourselves by cutting off all the tools we have at our disposal? If enhancing physical capabilities within the margins allows for top-notch athleticism, I see no harm. 

Let’s focus on the journey, the training, and the hard work—not just the result. Let’s aim to win fair by leveraging available means smartly.
